talk_metadata.institution_or_pharma: National Cancer Institute, Biorepositories and Biospecimen Research Branch
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "we didn't have any funding to do any pre-analytics"
Speaker noted: "the funding opportunity kind of fills the gap"

crispro_opportunity.description: Researchers need pre-analytical standardization for biomarker assays, which is not addressed by existing funding mechanisms.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "the funding opportunity kind of fills the gap" for pre-analytics and assay validation.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can provide computational models to predict optimal pre-analytical conditions and prioritize biomarkers for validation.

talk_metadata.institution_or_pharma: National Cancer Institute, Cancer Diagnosis Program
talk_metadata.talk_title: UH2/UH3 Funding for Biomarker Assay Validation
rhetorical_signals: Speaker emphasized: "the goal of the program is not regulatory approval, but assay readiness for clinical use"
Speaker warned: "applications that propose early stage development of technologies... would be more appropriate for other opportunities"

crispro_opportunity.description: The program seeks assays that can monitor treatment resistance; CrisPRO can model resistance pathways to guide assay design.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker described need for assays that predict "response or resistance to treatment".
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO's computational spine can identify predictive resistance signatures for inclusion in multiplex assays.

crispro_opportunity.description: Clarify endpoint requirements for liquid biopsy validation; CrisPRO can simulate statistical power for surrogate endpoints.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Q&A highlighted uncertainty about whether blood‑based surrogate endpoints are sufficient versus survival endpoints.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: Use CrisPRO to model correlation between liquid biopsy readouts and clinical outcomes to justify trial endpoints.

unresolved_questions: What specific clinical endpoints are acceptable for liquid biopsy validation under UH3?
How much correlation between blood and tissue biomarkers is required for funding approval?
